_comment_badge_pattern: SiteBadge and RoleBadge are neutral base components. Site/role-specific variants (SiteBadgeDealabs, etc.) are reusable refs that extend the base with preset colors — shape changes to the base propagate automatically.
_comment_logos: LogoIcon (40x40) is the standalone icon. LogoWithText (160x40) includes the full brand. Both use PNG fills and scale via ref width/height overrides.
_comment_siteSelector: SiteSelectorCard is the neutral base (no site-specific colors). Variants (SiteSelectorCardDealabs/Vinted/LBC) are reusable refs with preset dot color, label text, and selected/unselected state baked in. Dealabs variant = selected state (amber border + teal checkmark). Vinted/LBC = unselected state (gray border, no checkmark). Always use fill_container width when placing inside a flex row.
_comment_categoryPill: CategoryPill is the neutral base pill shape. CategoryPillEditable includes the X remove button (enabled) for use in editable forms like /filters/new. CategoryPillReadOnly has no X button for read-only views like /filters/:id. Both variants default to an orange dot + 'Cartes graphiques' label — override dot fill and text content via descendants.
